name: mcp-server-figma
description: Provide coding agents direct access to Figma data to help them one-shot design implementation.

rating.reason: Good documentation overall with clear names and comprehensive descriptions. Both tools provide adequate context about functionality and usage. Parameter documentation is generally thorough with helpful examples and constraints. Some minor areas for improvement include the depth parameter warning could be clearer, and a few technical parameters like cropTransform could benefit from more detailed explanations for non-Figma experts.
